hero.headline: Tampa roofs. *Hurricane-tested.* Owner-answered.
hero.subheadline: When other roofers ghost your calls, Nick picks up. Same-day quotes, reasonable prices, immaculate cleanup.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Full roofs to single tiles
services_section.subheading: From hurricane repairs to complete tear-offs, we handle what Tampa weather throws at you

services.title: Complete Roof Replacement
services.description: Tear-off to finish, with material options and financing. We coordinate with HOAs and handle every detail so you don't have to.

services.title: Storm Damage Repair
services.description: Missing tiles, wind damage, hurricane aftermath. Quick scheduling to get your roof sealed before the next storm hits.

services.title: Tile Repair & Replacement
services.description: Single tiles or sections, matched to your existing roof. No job too small when you need it fixed right.

about.heading: Nick answers the phone. That's how we work.
about.body: While other Tampa roofers leave you hanging, owner Nick Grahm takes every call personally. We've built our reputation on reasonable quotes, quick scheduling, and immaculate cleanup. Whether it's a complete tear-off or fixing storm damage tiles, we treat every Tampa roof like our own.

reviews.name: Izrael L.
reviews.text: From start to finish, Nick's service was exceptional. Unlike major roofers who treat you like just another job, he handled HOA coordination and every detail perfectly.

reviews.name: Luis Z.
reviews.text: Other roofers never called back. Found The Tampa Roofer online and Nick contacted me within minutes of submitting my quote request. Fast response, professional service.

reviews.name: Darleen G.
reviews.text: Super responsive right away with a reasonable quote to fix hurricane damage tiles. Got us scheduled quickly and completed the job with no issues whatsoever.

reviews.name: Scott A.
reviews.text: Complete roof tear-off and rebuild. Nick and Matt made the whole process smooth from material selection to financing and scheduling. Couldn't ask for better service.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Tampa Bay
service_areas.subheading: Fast response across the metro area

cta.heading: Ready to fix your roof?
cta.body: Nick answers personally. Get your quote today and see why Tampa trusts us with their biggest investment.
